lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਸਰਨਿ ਆਇਓ ਉਧਰੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾਨਿ ॥੨॥੧੨॥੩੧॥
lines.translit: patit paavan saran aaeo udhar naanak jaan |2|12|31|
lines.english: But I have entered the Sanctuary of the Purifier of sinners. O Nanak, I know that I shall be saved. ||2||12||31||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਲੋਭਿ ਬਿਆਪਿਓ ਜਨਮ ਹੀ ਕੀ ਖਾਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh lobh biaapio janam hee kee khaan |
lines.english: Engrossed in unfulfilled sexual desire, unresolved anger and greed, you shall be consigned to reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਰਤਨੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਬਿਸਰੀ ਸਭ ਚਿੰਦ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat ratan paaeo bisaree sabh chind |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Searching and seeking, I have found the Jewel. I am totally rid of all anxiety. ||1||Pause||
I gaze on the Lotus-like Face of the Lord.
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜ ਧਨੁ ਪਰਵਾਰੁ ਮੇਰੈ ਸਰਬਸੋ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ॥
lines.translit: raaj dhan paravaar merai sarabaso gobind |
lines.english: The Lord of all the Universe is my kingdom, wealth and family.
Enshrining His Lotus Feet within my heart,
pain and wickedness have been dispelled. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧਸੰਗਮਿ ਲਾਭੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਨਾਨਕ ਫਿਰਿ ਨ ਮਰੰਦ ॥੨॥੧੩॥੩੨॥
lines.translit: saadhasangam laabh paaeo naanak fir na marand |2|13|32|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, Nanak has earned the Profit; he shall never die again. ||2||13||32||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Fifth House:
Grasp the Feet of the Guru, the True Guru.
The Unfathomable Lord shall come into your mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗੁ ਜੀਤੋ ਹੋ ਹੋ ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾਧਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jag jeeto ho ho gur kirapaadh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and by Guru's Grace, you shall be victorious in this world. ||1||Pause||
Worship God, and adore His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਪੂਜਾ ਮੈ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਖੋਜੀ ਸਾ ਪੂਜਾ ਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: anik poojaa mai bahu bidh khojee saa poojaa ji har bhaavaas |
lines.english: I have studied countless ways of worship in all sorts of ways, but that alone is worship, which is pleasing to the Lord's Will.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਟੀ ਕੀ ਇਹ ਪੁਤਰੀ ਜੋਰੀ ਕਿਆ ਏਹ ਕਰਮ ਕਮਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: maattee kee ih putaree joree kiaa eeh karam kamaas |
lines.english: This body-puppet is made of clay - what can it do by itself?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਬਾਹ ਪਕਰਿ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਾਰਗਿ ਪਾਵਹੁ ਸੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਜੰਤ ਮਿਲਾਸਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: prabh baah pakar jis maarag paavahu so tudh jant milaas |1|
lines.english: O God, those humble beings meet You, whom You grasp by the arm, and place on the Path. ||1||
God abides in every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰ ਓਟ ਮੈ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸੂਝੈ ਇਕ ਹਰਿ ਕੀ ਓਟ ਮੈ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: avar ott mai koe na soojhai ik har kee ott mai aas |
lines.english: I do not know of any other support; O Lord, You are my only Hope and Support.
I am meek and poor - what prayer can I offer?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸੁ ਕਹੀਅਤੁ ਹੈ ਤੁਮੑਰਾ ਹਉ ਬਲਿ ਬਲਿ ਸਦ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਸ ॥੨॥੧॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: jan naanak daas kaheeat hai tumaraa hau bal bal sad bal jaas |2|1|33|
lines.english: Servant Nanak, Your slave, speaks: I am a sacrifice, a sacrifice, forever a sacrifice to You. ||2||1||33||
My mind is thirsty for the Feet of God.
Kaanraa, Fifth Mehl, Sixth House:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੇਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: nav nidh naam nidhaan har kerai |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the wealth of the nine treasures.
O mind, why do you cling to emotional attachments?
One who is imbued with the Love of the Incomparably Beautiful Lord is joyful.
Your Name, O my Beloved, is the Saving Grace of the world.
With your eyes, gaze upon the Blessed Vision, the Darshan of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਪਾਵੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਲਿਖਤੁ ਲਿਲੇਰੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: so paavai jis likhat lilerai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: They alone find it, who have such destiny inscribed upon their foreheads. ||1||Pause||
I serve at the feet of the Holy Saints.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਸਿ ਸਾਸਿ ਧਿਆਵਹੁ ਮੁਖੁ ਨਹੀ ਮੋਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: saas saas dhiaavahu mukh nahee morai |
lines.english: With each and every breath I meditate on Him, and never turn my face away.
I long for the dust of their feet, which purifies and sanctifies.
Just like the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage, it washes away filth and pollution.
Let it be your wish to honor and obey the One Formless Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਛੁ ਸੰਗਿ ਨ ਚਾਲੈ ਲਾਖ ਕਰੋਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: kichh sang na chaalai laakh karorai |
lines.english: Of your thousands and millions, nothing shall go along with you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀ ਕੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਅੰਤਿ ਪੁਕਰੋਰੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: prabh jee ko naam ant pukarorai |1|
lines.english: Only the Name of God will call to you in the end. ||1||
Abandon the love of everything else.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਕਹਾਂ ਹਉ ਗੁਨ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਤੇਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: kavan kahaan hau gun pria terai |
lines.english: What Glorious Praises of Yours can I utter, O my Beloved?
I cannot describe even one of Your Virtues.
My mind is so thirsty for the Blessed Vision of His Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਦੇਵ ਜਗਤ ਗੁਰ ਕੇਰੈ ॥੨॥੧॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: mil naanak dev jagat gur kerai |2|1|34|
lines.english: Please come and meet Nanak, O Divine Guru of the World. ||2||1||34||
